lastFailureSignature: install|install-failed|Tool 'shelf' failed to update due to the following: The settings file in the tool's NuGet package is invalid: Settings file 'DotnetToolSettings.xml' was not found in the package. Tool 'shelf' failed to install. Contact the tool author for assistance.
lastFailureMessage:
Tool 'shelf' failed to update due to the following:
The settings file in the tool's NuGet package is invalid: Settings file 'DotnetToolSettings.xml' was not found in the package.
Tool 'shelf' failed to install. Contact the tool author for assistance.
